_test_notes.purpose: Standard tecnoLC2 layout — all four sensor slots present and cited from a real, already-confirmed profile.
_test_notes.provenance: Numbers copied from the cc25051112_chlorinator comment in custom_components/fluidra_pool/device_registry/configs/chlorinators.py (Zodiac GenSalt OE iQ pH 25 IVO, Issue #80, @lolo31370): pH 7.5, ORP 663 mV (c177=725 uncalibrated), water temperature 21.3 degC, salinity 3.7 g/L, chlorination 100%, ORP setpoint 750 mV. pH setpoint (c16) and boost mode (c103) are synthetic placeholders, not from the cited comment.
_test_notes.expected_outcome: propose_device_profile.py should propose a _standard_tecnolc2(...) call: ph->165, orp->170, temperature->172, salinity->174 all match the standard slots exactly (0% error).
